notes: Reference prompts for AI template draft generation

items.title: Fiery Bandaged Fighter
items.prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a battle-worn man with an intense expression, short styled hair, and sharp facial features. His face is bruised, bloodied, and covered with fresh cuts and dirt. He holds a glowing fiery fist near his mouth, with a hand wrapped in textured combat bandages emitting lava-like cracks and orange flames. Sparks fly in the air. Dramatic lighting with high contrast, detailed skin texture, sweat and grit, dark minimal background, shallow depth of field, hyper-detailed, volumetric lighting, intense mood, action movie poster style.
items.styleNotes: Explosive masculine action portrait with glowing fire accents, dramatic contrast, and strong cinematic poster energy.

items.title: Lemon Soda Campaign Girl
items.prompt: A stylish young woman poses in a fresh commercial beverage advertisement scene, holding a glass of ice-cold lemon soda with a lime slice garnish. The background is a smooth gradient of mint green and teal, creating a refreshing summer vibe. Studio lighting, soft shadows, ultra-realistic skin texture, high detail, product advertising style, vibrant colors, crisp focus, professional commercial photography.
items.styleNotes: Bright commercial campaign aesthetic with clean studio light, product focus, and energetic summer color palette.

items.title: Man of Fire and Fragments
items.prompt: A hyper-realistic cinematic scene of a man transforming into a fiery entity. His body breaks apart into burning fragments and flying debris, with glowing molten cracks spreading across his skin. Intense flames erupt from his chest and shoulder. The background features a dark stormy sky with heavy clouds, while orange fire contrasts with cool blue tones. Ultra-detailed textures, dynamic motion blur, volumetric lighting, epic composition, sharp focus, dramatic shadows, and high contrast.
items.styleNotes: Transformation-driven cinematic fantasy with violent energy, debris, and fiery body effects.

Cinematic neon lighting with vibrant pink and cyan glow casts dramatic highlights and shadows across her face and hair. Futuristic cyberpunk aesthetic, gradient background blending magenta and teal tones, soft rim lighting, high contrast, studio-quality lighting, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed skin texture, professional fashion photography, sharp focus, and a modern digital-art feel.
items.styleNotes: Contemporary neon beauty portrait with haircut emphasis, magenta-cyan lighting, and polished cyber fashion mood.

items.title: Rune-Painted Viking Warrior
items.prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a rugged warrior man in his mid-40s with a strong masculine face, piercing blue eyes, and an intense expression. His face, head, neck, and upper chest are covered with ancient tribal war paint and rune-like symbols inspired by Norse and Viking mythology. Paint colors include deep red, burnt orange, teal blue, and black, with cracked weathered texture as if applied to aged skin. A central sacred sun symbol is painted on the forehead, with symmetrical tribal markings across the cheeks and temples. Thick grey beard, short rough hair, dramatic low-key lighting, dark black background, hyper-detailed skin texture, visible pores, wrinkles, paint cracks, shallow depth of field, cinematic color grading, moody atmosphere, ultra-sharp focus, and epic fantasy character energy.
items.styleNotes: Powerful Norse-inspired warrior close-up with sacred symbols, painted ritual detail, and dark epic masculinity.

items.title: Fashion Sketch Park Walk
items.prompt: A cinematic fashion portrait of a young woman walking on a stone pathway in a lush green park. Soft natural daylight filters through the trees, and the shallow depth of field creates a creamy bokeh background. She wears black combat boots, fitted jeans, and a casual top, holding a jacket loosely off her shoulders. Her expression is calm and introspective, looking slightly downward while walking. A glowing white hand-drawn sketch outline overlays her outfit and body, blending fashion illustration with realistic photography. Ultra-realistic, editorial fashion style, clean composition, soft shadows, natural color grading, high detail, and modern aesthetic.
items.styleNotes: Hybrid fashion-photo illustration look with clean natural park setting and subtle hand-drawn overlay effect.
